zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Pudsey Esq.於大約1450年出生在英國越可爾時，他的父親Sir John Pudsey16歲，母親Grace Hamerton31歲。他於1467年與Margaret Conyers在英國藍卡爾宏比 卡素結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於從1517年9月6日到1518年3月1日在英國藍卡爾博爾頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Pudsey Esq.于大约1450年出生在英国越可爾时，他的父亲Sir John Pudsey16岁，母亲Grace Hamerton31岁。他于1467年与Margaret Conyers在英国藍卡爾宏比 卡素结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于从1517年9月6日到1518年3月1日在英国藍卡爾博爾頓。

nameMeanings.name: Pudsey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Pudsey (WR Yorks), which is recorded as Podechesai(e) in 1086, Pudekesseya in the 12th century, and Pudekeshay in 1219. The place-name probably derives from an Old English personal name * Pudoc (genitive * Pudoces) + Old English ēg ‘island’. Pudsey stands on the top of a hill, and so in this case ēg may have the sense ‘hill spur, island of good land in moorland’. Alternatively, the final element may be Old English (ge)hæg ‘enclosure’ or hēah ‘high ground, height’.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Pudsey Esq. was born about 1450, in Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir John Pudsey, was 16 and his mother, Grace Hamerton, was 31. He married Margaret Conyers in 1467, in Hornby Castle, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He died from 6 September 1517 to 1 March 1518, in Bolton, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Pudsey Esq. est né environ 1450, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Pudsey, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Grace Hamerton, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Conyers en 1467, à Hornby Castle, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé du 6 septembre 1517 au 1 mars 1518, à Bolton, Lancashire, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Pudsey Esq.が約1450年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir John Pudseyは16歳，母Grace Hamertonは31歳であった。1467年にイギリスランカシュアイアホールンビー カストルでMargaret Conyersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼はから1517年9月6日まで1518年3月1日にイギリスランカシュアイアボルトンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Pudsey Esq.(이)가 대략 1450년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Pudsey(은)는 16세였고, 그의 어머니 Grace Hamerton(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1467년 영국 랭카실르 호른비 카스틀에서 Margaret Conyers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1517년 9월 6일부터 1518년 3월 1일까지 영국 랭카실르 볼턴에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Pudsey Esq. родился около 1450 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Pudsey было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Grace Hamerton, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Conyers в 1467 г. в местности хаурнби кастл, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер с 6 сентября 1517 по 1 марта 1518 в местности болтон, ланкашир, Англия.
